public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as repair hand.
manner: Views problems as maintenance loads, throughput failures, or structural weaknesses before anything else. In Nomdara Caravan, that reads as someone adaptable, mobile, and transactionally warm, always reading routes, people, and changing terms, and the habits of a repair hand still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of repair hand in and around Elder Consensus Hearing Wagon, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Elder Consensus Hearing Wagon workable through the obligations of repair hand while managing the immediate pressure of route danger in Nomdara Caravan.
hidden_pressure: Must absorb delayed maintenance, thin staffing, and practical strain before failure becomes public. Around Elder Consensus Hearing Wagon, that usually means carrying route danger, whirlpool and weather risk, dependency on negotiated access without letting the role of repair hand visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Varek Wheelwright can open restricted paths or practical knowledge if the party helps keep the underlying system alive.
Varek Wheelwright needs outside help before wear, sabotage, or bottleneck pressure turns into a public failure in Elder Consensus Hearing Wagon.

support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained.
public_signal: Tool wear, work scars, or system-focused habits make Varek Wheelwright visibly responsible for keeping something larger from failing.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Elder Consensus Hearing Wagon: worksites, depots, spans, loading points, maintenance corridors, or workshops
